package service

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for service_method_mutates_transport_dto_in_place: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Services that rewrite handler DTOs instead of mapping to service-layer inputs.
type CaseServiceMethodMutatesTransportDtoInPlaceDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseServiceMethodMutatesTransportDtoInPlaceModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseServiceMethodMutatesTransportDtoInPlaceRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseServiceMethodMutatesTransportDtoInPlaceModel
}

type CaseServiceMethodMutatesTransportDtoInPlaceService struct {
    repo *CaseServiceMethodMutatesTransportDtoInPlaceRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseServiceMethodMutatesTransportDtoInPlaceAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveServiceMethodMutatesTransportDtoInPlace(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseServiceMethodMutatesTransportDtoInPlaceDTO) error {
    focus := "service_method_mutates_transport_dto"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseServiceMethodMutatesTransportDtoInPlaceDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    service := &CaseServiceMethodMutatesTransportDtoInPlaceService{repo: &CaseServiceMethodMutatesTransportDtoInPlaceRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseServiceMethodMutatesTransportDtoInPlaceModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    service_method_mutates_transport_dto_positive := map[string]int{"service": 1, "method": 2, "mutates": 3, "transport": 4, "dto": 5, "place": 6}
    service_method_mutates_transport_dto_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    service_positive_0 := CaseServiceMethodMutatesTransportDtoInPlaceDTO{ID: input, Status: "service"}
    _ = service_positive_0
    method_positive_1 := service_method_mutates_transport_dto_positive["method"] + len(input)
    _ = method_positive_1
    mutates_positive_2 := service_method_mutates_transport_dto_positive["mutates"] + len(input)
    _ = mutates_positive_2
    transport_positive_3 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = transport_positive_3
    dto_positive_4 := CaseServiceMethodMutatesTransportDtoInPlaceDTO{ID: input, Status: "dto"}
    _ = dto_positive_4
    place_positive_5 := service_method_mutates_transport_dto_positive["place"] + len(input)
    _ = place_positive_5
    return nil
}
